name: Soccer With Satan
short_description: Soccer With Satan is a fast-paced 1v1 real-time tactical soccer game set in Hell. Control minions, collect mana, and unleash violent commander abilities. Score goals or obliterate your opponent's team to claim victory in this chaotic, infernal soccer showdown.
detailed_description:
RTS + Football

Soccer With Satan is a soccer game played like an RTS. Micro manage minions to victory by kicking balls, collecting mana, and unleashing violent trainer abilities on your opponents.

1v1 Instant Action

Challenge your friends online, or play against strangers using quick play. Matches are short, quick to set up and offer high intensity 1v1 micro management gameplay.

Violent And Unserious

Pick up mana on the field to enable your trainer's violent abilities, or score a goal for an instant refill. Abilities range from sliding tackles and air-strikes, to evasive jumps and charged kicks.

Score or Kill to Win

Win matches by scoring the most goals, or killing all the opponent players. Arenas also come with their own deadly twists, like the ghouligans of Hooligan Hollow that chase both ball and minions.

What to expect:

  • A fresh mix of soccer and RTS
  • Short rounds with high intensity gameplay
  • Traditional game design, centered around actual gameplay
  • Online play against friends
  • Online matchmaking
  • 5 trainers each offering 2 unique abilities each and custom units
  • 3 arenas, each with its own deadly mechanics

What NOT to expect:

  • A bug free experience(!)
  • Elaborate progression systems
  • Other evil retention mechanics
  • A single player mode
  • Any respect for soccer

Made by Christer and Alex :)
